about.label: The Agent
about.title: Eva Franch Castells
about.bio1: A Spanish journalist with roots in Catalonia and a cosmopolitan spirit that led her to fall in love with Santiago de Chile. Passionate about great cities, design, and fashion, she found in real estate the perfect intersection between her aesthetic sensibility and her ability to connect people with spaces that transform lives.
about.bio2: With a unique perspective shaped in Europe and tempered by the dynamism of the Chilean capital, Eva guides her clients through one of the most important moments of their lives: finding the place they call home.

properties.label: Exclusive Portfolio
properties.title: Selected Properties
properties.subtitle: Each property is chosen for its quality, location, and potential. We don't sell spaces, we create opportunities.
properties.whatsapp_msg: Hi Eva, I'm interested in the property *{title}* in {location} (UF {price}). {link} Can we talk?

process.label: The Process
process.title: How I Work
process.subtitle: Personalized guidance from first contact to final signature.
process.step1_desc: We discuss your needs, budget, and vision. Understanding your lifestyle is the first step to finding the ideal property.
process.step2_desc: We filter the market with professional criteria. I only present properties that truly match what you're looking for, without wasting your time.
process.step3_desc: I accompany you through every detail of the legal and financial process. My goal is for you to reach the signing with complete peace of mind.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Let's Talk
contact.subtitle: Have a property in mind or looking for a new one? Write to me and I'll get back to you shortly.
contact.name: Your name
contact.success: Message sent! I'll be in touch soon.
